first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are virtually identical. The scores are the same, and the text in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is semantically equivalent, with only minor rephrasing (e.g., "specific experience" vs. "direct experience"). These differences fall well within the range of ordinary run-to-run noise and show no reaction to the demographic change in the candidate's name.
